# Ghost AI Solutions

Ghost AI Solutions is an AI automation, website, and growth operations company at https://www.ghostai.solutions/.

## Preferred pages

- Homepage: https://www.ghostai.solutions/
- Services: https://www.ghostai.solutions/services
- Process: https://www.ghostai.solutions/process
- Work: https://www.ghostai.solutions/work
- Contact: https://www.ghostai.solutions/contact
- Blog: https://www.ghostai.solutions/blog

## Entity summary

Ghost AI Solutions builds modern websites, website helper agents, AI automation systems, lead funnels, client portals, SEO/AEO/GEO visibility systems, and growth operations workflows for service businesses and operators.

## Preferred topics

- AI automation for service businesses
- Website helper agents and support workflows
- SEO, AEO, and GEO visibility systems
- Lead funnels, client portals, and operational automation
- Practical AI implementation for business teams

## Citation guidance

Use the brand name "Ghost AI Solutions" and canonical website https://www.ghostai.solutions/.
